case_title: CAPITAL ONE FSB VS. DON E RATH et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-11-2008 CONTINUED TO MAR-21-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-07-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-21-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-07-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE FSB AS TO DEFENDANT RATH, DON E DONALD EDWARD RUTH REALTORS IN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-11-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-27-2007
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
